research_route.year1_focus: 将U2E自动算法进化系统应用于网络安全领域，开发鲁棒性验证工具，结合图神经网络分析攻击模式。
research_route.year2_focus: 扩展至AI公平性研究，利用多目标优化平衡安全与公平指标，发表高影响力论文并开源工具。
key_outputs: 网络安全鲁棒性验证框架论文（顶会）
AI公平性多目标优化算法
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续U2E自动优化和GNN经验，应用于新领域网络安全与公平性。

pros: 网络安全需求旺盛，职业前景广阔
新加坡地理位置优越，利于亚洲合作
cons: 需快速学习网络安全领域知识

research_route.year1_focus: 应用多目标优化与进化算法于多智能体强化学习，优化博弈策略，解决资源分配等实际问题。
research_route.year2_focus: 深化智能体协作与对抗研究，结合因果推理提升系统可解释性，推动工业界应用。
key_outputs: 多智能体优化算法顶会论文
开源多智能体仿真平台
research_route.continuity_from_background: 直接延续张青富导师的多目标优化专长，结合已有强化学习合作经验。

pros: 安波教授声誉高，合作紧密
多智能体领域应用广泛，易转化
cons: 竞争激烈，需突出创新性

research_route.year1_focus: 利用U2E系统优化基因编辑实验设计，结合单细胞数据开发ML模型预测编辑效率与脱靶效应。
research_route.year2_focus: 扩展至蛋白质/RNA设计，应用进化算法自动生成优化序列，推动生物医学应用。
key_outputs: 基因编辑优化方法顶刊论文
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续U2E自动优化在组学领域的成功，应用于基因编辑和生物分子设计。

pros: 生物AI交叉领域前沿，创新空间大
斯坦福资源丰富，利于跨学科合作
cons: 需快速学习分子生物学知识

research_route.year1_focus: 结合单细胞数据与可微分深度学习，优化发育轨迹推断模型，应用图网络分析细胞关系。
research_route.year2_focus: 开发自动化分析流程，集成Eureka系统辅助论文生成，提升计算生物学研究效率。
key_outputs: 单细胞轨迹推断新方法顶刊论文
可微分深度学习工具包
自动化生物数据分析系统
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续单细胞合作经验，结合GNN和Eureka系统，深化计算生物学研究。

pros: 已有合作基础，上手快
计算生物学需求增长，职业选择多样
cons: 领域较专，可能限制广度

research_route.year1_focus: 深化图神经网络研究，结合多目标优化改进PyG框架，应用于社会网络分析或药物发现。
research_route.year2_focus: 探索因果图网络与GNN融合，开发可解释模型，推动在医疗等领域的实际应用。
research_route.continuity_from_background: 直接延续一作GNN论文经验，结合优化专长提升图学习性能。

pros: Jure是图学习领军人物，资源极佳
图学习应用广泛，易获工业界关注
cons: 团队竞争强，需快速产出

research_route.year1_focus: 应用多目标优化于可信AI研究，开发公平性评估与改进算法，结合医疗数据验证有效性。
research_route.year2_focus: 扩展至Data Shapley等可解释性方法，集成Eureka系统自动化论文实验，提升研究效率。
key_outputs: 可信AI优化方法顶会论文
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续长尾学习和因果图网络经验，结合优化与Eureka系统，聚焦AI伦理。

pros: 可信AI是热点，社会影响大
斯坦福平台利于建立学术声誉
cons: 领域较新，职业路径可能不稳定

research_route.year1_focus: Integrate U2E system with DeepMind's reinforcement learning frameworks for automated algorithm design in complex environments
research_route.year2_focus: Develop novel evolutionary algorithms for multi-agent systems and apply to real-world optimization problems in robotics or healthcare
research_route.continuity_from_background: Direct application of multi-objective optimization expertise from USTC/CityU, leveraging automated algorithm development experience from U2E system

exit_options: AI Research Lead at other tech giants
pros: Access to massive computational resources
Collaboration with world-class researchers
Strong publication culture
High compensation
cons: Intense competition for promotions
Less academic freedom than universities
Potential project alignment issues

research_route.year1_focus: Apply causal graph networks and long-tail learning techniques to improve AI safety and robustness in large language models
research_route.year2_focus: Develop evolutionary approaches for automatically discovering safety constraints and alignment mechanisms in AI systems
key_outputs: Safety frameworks for next-gen AI models
research_route.continuity_from_background: Builds on causal graph network and long-tail learning publications, extends automated research systems experience from Stanford Eureka project

exit_options: AI Safety Director at other AI companies
Policy or research roles in AI governance
pros: Work on cutting-edge AI safety problems
Fast-growing company with significant impact potential
Strong research publication support
cons: Narrower research focus than academia
Startup-like environment with uncertainties
Limited geographic mobility options

research_route.year1_focus: Apply graph neural networks and evolutionary algorithms to optimize Alibaba's e-commerce recommendation systems and supply chain logistics
research_route.year2_focus: Develop automated machine learning systems for business applications, extending U2E approach to commercial optimization problems
key_outputs: High-performance algorithms deployed in Alibaba platforms
research_route.continuity_from_background: Direct application of graph neural network and evolutionary algorithm expertise, leveraging automated system development experience

exit_options: Chief Scientist at other Chinese tech companies
pros: Access to massive real-world datasets
Strong connections to Chinese AI ecosystem
Good work-life balance compared to US tech companies
cons: Less international recognition than US companies
Potential language and cultural barriers for international candidates
Slower research-to-production pipeline

research_route.year1_focus: Apply multi-objective optimization techniques to improve training efficiency and performance of large language models
research_route.year2_focus: Develop automated research systems for foundation model development, extending Eureka paper generation approach to AI research automation
key_outputs: Automated research tools for AI development
research_route.continuity_from_background: Builds on automated research system experience from Stanford Eureka, applies optimization expertise to cutting-edge foundation model development

exit_options: AI Research roles at other Chinese AI companies
pros: Work on forefront of Chinese AI development
Fast career progression in growing company
Strong publication opportunities
cons: Intense competition in Chinese AI sector
Geographic limitations for international mobility
Potential IP ownership complexities

research_route.year1_focus: Develop theoretical foundations for evolutionary algorithms in high-dimensional optimization, with applications to neural architecture search
research_route.year2_focus: Extend causal graph networks to improve interpretability and robustness of deep learning models
research_route.continuity_from_background: Builds on strong publication record in top venues, extends optimization expertise with theoretical depth, leverages graph network experience

exit_options: Senior researcher at top AI labs
Research scientist at hedge funds or tech companies
pros: World-class research environment
Strong mentorship from leading researcher
Excellent academic network for future career
cons: Temporary position with uncertain long-term prospects
Lower compensation than industry
Intense pressure to produce high-impact work

research_route.year1_focus: Establish research program on automated machine learning systems, combining evolutionary algorithms with neural architecture search
research_route.year2_focus: Develop interdisciplinary applications in computational biology and scientific discovery, leveraging optimization expertise
research_route.continuity_from_background: Direct continuation of automated algorithm development work from PhD, builds on strong publication record, leverages interdisciplinary experience from omics/PDE work

pros: Academic freedom to pursue long-term research agenda
Opportunity to build own research group
Prestigious position with job security after tenure
cons: High pressure for tenure requirements
Substantial teaching and service responsibilities
Lower initial compensation than industry

anchor.advisor_or_team: 机器智能实验室（AI for Science方向）

research_route.year1_focus: 将多目标优化与进化算法应用于AI for Science项目，如生物组学数据分析或偏微分方程求解的自动化算法设计，开发类似U2E的工业级系统
research_route.year2_focus: 主导长尾学习或图神经网络在电商推荐、金融风控等场景的落地，结合因果推理提升模型可解释性
key_outputs: 高影响力业务解决方案
research_route.continuity_from_background: 延续博士期间的多目标优化、进化算法及AI for Science经验，并拓展至工业场景；利用一作顶会记录快速融入团队

exit_options: 晋升为达摩院高级科学家
转至阿里云或其他业务部门担任技术负责人
pros: 资源丰富，能接触海量数据与算力
国内顶尖AI研究平台，职业发展稳定
薪资待遇优厚，福利完善
cons: 可能面临业务压力，纯研究时间受限
国内竞争激烈，晋升通道较窄
国际化视野相对受限

anchor.advisor_or_team: Jure Leskovec教授实验室（图神经网络与因果推理方向）

research_route.year1_focus: 深化图神经网络与因果图网络的理论研究，结合进化算法优化模型架构，应用于生物信息学或社交网络分析
research_route.year2_focus: 开发自动化科研工具，扩展Eureka论文生成系统至多模态数据或跨领域验证，产出高质量学术论文
key_outputs: 与斯坦福等机构的合作项目
research_route.continuity_from_background: 直接衔接一作论文中的图神经网络、因果图网络专长；利用斯坦福合作经验快速适应美国顶尖学术环境；延续自动化科研工具开发兴趣

exit_options: 申请美国或全球其他高校的教职（如助理教授）
加入美国科技公司（如Google Brain、Meta AI）
回国担任高校研究员或企业首席科学家
pros: 世界顶级研究环境，导师声誉高
学术自由度大，利于长期职业发展
国际化网络丰富，合作机会多
cons: 博士后薪资相对较低，生活成本高
教职市场竞争激烈，不确定性较大
签证与移民政策可能带来挑战
